messages.content:
Here is a list of WWE Superstars. List in Parenthesis after their name, all the names of the Tag Teams each Wrestler has been in, including names of Tag members in Sub parenthesis, divided by commas. Be Detailed and include every tag team over a wrestlers career. Make Every WWE Superstar on their own line. Don’t include bullet points, dashes or number the list. The List of Superstars is as follows:
Dominik Mysterio
Dragon Lee
Drew Gulak
Drew McIntyre
Duke Hudson
Eddy Thorpe
Edge
Edris Enofé
Elektra Lopez
Elias

Dominik Mysterio (with Rey Mysterio Jr.)
Dragon Lee (with RUSH, Mistico, Titan, and Ultimo Guerrero)
Drew Gulak (with Tony Nese, Jack Gallagher, and Brian Kendrick)
Drew McIntyre (with Cody Rhodes, Dolph Ziggler, and Angela)
Duke Hudson (with Dan Maloney)
Eddy Thorpe (with Doug Williams)
Edge (with Christian, Randy Orton, Hulk Hogan, Chris Jericho, Rey Mysterio Jr., Chris Benoit, Rhyno, and Lance Storm)
Edris Enofé (with Briana Brandy)
Elektra Lopez (with Legado Del Fantasma)
Elias (with Shane Thorne and Jaxson Ryker)

Here is a list of WWE Superstars. List in Parenthesis after their name, all the Tag Teams each Wrestler has been in, including names of Tag members in Sub parenthesis, divided by commas. Be Detailed and include every tag team over a wrestlers career. Make Every WWE Superstar on their own line. Don’t include bullet points, dashes or number the list. The format should be: WWE Superstar (Tag Tam Name - (Tag Team Members), Tag Tam Name - (Tag Team Members), etc.) The List of Superstars is as follows: Dominik Mysterio
Dragon Lee
Drew Gulak
Drew McIntyre
Duke Hudson
Eddy Thorpe
Edge
Edris Enofé
Elektra Lopez
Elias

Dominik Mysterio (The Mysterios - Rey Mysterio Jr.)
Dragon Lee (Los Ingobernables de Japon - RUSH, EVIL, SANADA, BUSHI, and Hiromu Takahashi)
Drew Gulak (The Gulak Dynasty - Tony Nese, Ariya Daivari, and Jack Gallagher)
Drew McIntyre (The Chosen Ones - Cody Rhodes and Angela, The Scottish Connection - Robbie Dynamite and William Grange, War Machine - Shane Thorne)
Duke Hudson (The Hunt - Dan Moloney)
Eddy Thorpe (New Breed - Doug Williams)
Edge (Rated-RKO - Randy Orton, The Brood - Gangrel and Christian, Edgeheads - Curt Hawkins and Zack Ryder, The Colóns - Carlito and Primo, The Hardy Boyz - Matt and Jeff Hardy, Hulk Hogan and Edge, Chris Jericho and Edge, Rey Mysterio and Edge, Chris Benoit and Edge, La Familia - Vickie Guerrero, Chavo Guerrero, and Bam Neely, Edge and Lita, The Major Brothers - Curt Hawkins and Zack Ryder, Edge and Christian, Edge and Rhyno, Edge and Lance Storm)
Edris Enofé (Alpha Academy - Chad Gable and Otis)
Elektra Lopez (Legado Del Fantasma - Santos Escobar and Joaquin Wilde)
Elias (The Authors of Pain - Akam and Rezar, The Varsity Club - Jaxson Ryker and Wesley Blake, Elias and Shane Thorne)
